mapper.select:
SELECT nr.record_id, nr.reception_id, nr.status, nr.respiration, nr.observation, nr.systolic_bp, nr.diastolic_bp, nr.pulse, nr.temperature, nr.consciousness_level, nr.spo2, nr.nursing_id, nr.initial_assessment, nr.past_medical_history, nr.nurse_name, receipt_dept.department_name AS department_name, p.name AS patient_name, nr.height_cm, nr.weight_kg, nr.created_at FROM CHJ.NURSING_RECORD nr LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL.RECEPTION rc ON nr.reception_id = rc.reception_id LEFT JOIN CMH.STAFF_DEPARTMENT receipt_dept ON receipt_dept.department_id = TO_CHAR(rc.department_id) LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL.PATIENT p ON rc.patient_id = p.patient_id
nr.record_id = #{searchValue}
nr.reception_id = #{searchValue}
(nr.nurse_name LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR nr.nursing_id LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%')
p.name LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
receipt_dept.department_name LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
nr.created_at BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDate} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
1 = 0
ORDER BY nr.record_id DESC

SELECT nr.record_id, nr.reception_id, nr.created_at, nr.respiration, nr.status, nr.observation, nr.systolic_bp, nr.diastolic_bp, nr.pulse, nr.temperature, nr.consciousness_level, nr.spo2, nr.nursing_id, nr.initial_assessment, nr.past_medical_history, nr.nurse_name, receipt_dept.department_name AS department_name, p.name AS patient_name, nr.height_cm, nr.weight_kg FROM CHJ.NURSING_RECORD nr LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL.RECEPTION rc ON nr.reception_id = rc.reception_id LEFT JOIN CMH.STAFF_DEPARTMENT receipt_dept ON receipt_dept.department_id = TO_CHAR(rc.department_id) LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL.PATIENT p ON rc.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY nr.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, nr.record_id DESC

SELECT nr.record_id, nr.reception_id, nr.created_at, nr.status, nr.respiration, nr.observation, nr.systolic_bp, nr.diastolic_bp, nr.pulse, nr.temperature, nr.spo2, nr.nursing_id, nr.consciousness_level, nr.initial_assessment, nr.past_medical_history, TO_CHAR(nr.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at, nr.height_cm, nr.weight_kg, nr.nurse_name, receipt_dept.department_name AS department_name, rc.patient_id AS patient_id, p.name AS patient_name, nr.pain_score FROM CHJ.NURSING_RECORD nr LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL.RECEPTION rc ON nr.reception_id = rc.reception_id LEFT JOIN CMH.STAFF_DEPARTMENT receipt_dept ON receipt_dept.department_id = TO_CHAR(rc.department_id) LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL.PATIENT p ON rc.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE nr.record_id = #{recordId}
